data.title: Bitcoins moving from exchanges to non-custodial wallets: current and future reasons and potential impact

After most significant failures of centralized platforms such as FTX, we could observe a large uptick in Bitcoin withdrawals from exchanges.

data.title: US-Russia prisoner swap: BTC-e exchange operator released
data.description:
The prisoner exchange saw Marc Fogel return to the United States after more than three years of detention in Russia, while Alexander Vinnik, accused of money laundering through bitcoin, was handed back to Moscow.
The post US-Russia prisoner swap: BTC-e exchange operator released appeared first on Atlas21.
source: https://atlas21.com/us-russia-prisoner-swap-btc-e-exchange-operator-released/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=us-russia-prisoner-swap-btc-e-exchange-operator-released

data.title: BNB Drops Below 700 USDT with a Narrowed 9.45% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 13, 2025, 08:16 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 700 USDT and is now trading at 698.5 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 9.45% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Lumoz Chain mainnet is launched, decentralized AI products start grayscale testing
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Modular AI computing network Lumoz officially announced that Lumoz Chain will be officially launched at 16:00 (UTC+8) on February 13, 2025. At the same time, Lumoz's decentralized AI products also started grayscale testing, and eligible users can apply to participate in the experience.
To ensure a smooth transition of the main network, the entire migration cycle will last 30 days. During this period, users can migrate their original tokens/nodes and other related assets from Arbitrum to Lumoz Chain. Users who actively participate in the migration and new chain construction will also receive additional OG NFT rewards of different levels, which can be used for early unlocking from esMOZ to MOZ.
On February 12, Lumoz officially announced that it has suspended the Verifier node mining rewards and Redeem functions on Arbitrum, and the collection of Lumoz OG NFT has also been stopped. It is reported that the core components of Lumoz Chain are composed of Verifier nodes and Compute nodes, which will work together effectively to provide more powerful computing support for AI and ZK applications. Officials revealed that Compute node mining may be officially launched soon.

data.title: Megabit will launch TST/USDT perpetual contract, supporting 75x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Megabit will officially launch TST/USDT perpetual contract at 18:00 (SGT) on February 7, with a leverage range of 1-75 times.

data.title: The total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETF is US$113.913 billion, with a cumulative net inflow of US$40.207 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 12, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$251 million. Yesterday, Grayscale ETF GBTC had a single-day net outflow of US$6.9162 million, and the current historical net outflow of GBTC is US$21.959 billion. Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF BTC had a single-day net inflow of US$16.3424 million, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust BTC is US$1.253 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is US$113.913 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) is 5.92%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$40.207 billion.

data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 12, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETF was 40.948 million US dollars. 
Yesterday, Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE had a single-day net outflow of 30.226 million US dollars, and the current historical net outflow of ETHE is 3.978 billion US dollars. 
Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH had a single-day net outflow of 0.00 US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETH is 612 million US dollars. 
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 10.114 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.13%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 3.128 billion US dollars.

data.title: Gate.io will launch HEI perpetual contract, supporting up to 50x leverage
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate.io will launch Heima (HEI) perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement) at 16:00 (UTC+8) on February 13, 2025, supporting 1-50 times leverage.
CoinGecko data shows that Gate.io has cumulatively supported more than 600 perpetual contract currencies, and is the preferred platform for more than 21 million users worldwide.

source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/blum-secures-5m-to-expand-ai-trading-on-telegram

data.title: European Central Bank May Implement Three More Rate Cuts This Year
data.description:
According to Odaily, European Central Bank (ECB) Governing Council member Vujcic has indicated that the ECB might implement three more interest rate cuts this year. This comes even as the U.S. Federal Reserve slows its pace of rate reductions. The continuation of the ECB's easing policy is contingent upon a rapid decline in core inflation. Since June of last year, the ECB has reduced borrowing costs five times and has signaled further policy easing, prompting investor speculation about the speed and extent of future rate cuts.

Vujcic stated, "The market expects three more rate cuts this year. These expectations are not unreasonable." However, he emphasized that data in the coming months will be crucial, as forecasts suggest a significant drop in inflation within the services sector. This sector represents the largest single component of the consumer price basket and has been a major driver of excessive price growth over the past year.

"For rate cuts to materialize, we need to see a slowdown in core inflation and services inflation," Vujcic, who is considered a moderate hawk, remarked.
